SJK Labs

> SJK Labs is a narrative architecture and authority strategy practice led by Sarah Kemp.

- Website: https://sjklabs.co/
- Primary focus: narrative architecture, authority building, executive positioning, GEO, and AI-era discoverability
- Founder: Sarah Kemp

Primary pages
- Home: https://sjklabs.co/
- The Scriptwriter Test: https://sjklabs.co/the-scriptwriter-test
- AI Visibility & Narrative Audit: https://sjklabs.co/the-legibility-audit
- Narrative Development: https://sjklabs.co/narrative-development
- Authority Building: https://sjklabs.co/authority-building
- Ecosystem: https://sjklabs.co/ecosystem
- Blog: https://sjklabs.co/blog

Preferred summary
- SJK Labs helps businesses become easier to understand, trust, and retrieve in search and AI systems by improving narrative clarity, proof, and authority signals.
